description_long: This is a modern, urban scooter with a streamlined body and a two-tone color scheme of gray and orange accents. The scooter features a wide, comfortable seat suitable for one or two riders, and a spacious foot deck for easy mounting and stability. The front is equipped with angular headlights and rearview mirrors, while the rear showcases a prominent taillight assembly. The wheels are solid and robust, designed for city streets, and the side panels display subtle branding and design lines. The handlebar is fitted with mirrors and controls, and the overall build suggests a lightweight yet sturdy frame, likely made from a combination of metal and plastic.
description: A sleek, gray and orange urban scooter with a wide seat, angular headlights, and sturdy wheels, designed for city commuting. Features include rearview mirrors, a spacious foot deck, and a prominent taillight.
description_view_0: Front view shows the angular headlights, front fender, and both rearview mirrors clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the wide seat, spacious foot deck, and the front and rear wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the large taillight assembly, rear fender, and the back of the seat.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the side panel branding, seat, and both wheels, similar to the left side.
attribute_deck_design: wide, flat, and smooth with subtle side ridges for grip
attribute_brand_logo: Orange and white text/logo on the front fender and side panel
